_comment.description: ESLint Configuration - When does this get used?
when_eslint_runs: 1. Developer runs: npm run lint (manual check)
2. Developer runs: npm run lint -- --fix (auto-fix issues)
3. IDE integration: VSCode/IDE shows red squiggles for violations
4. Pre-commit hook (if configured): Runs before git commit
5. CI/CD Pipeline: GitHub Actions/CodeBuild runs npm run lint before build
6. Watch mode: npm run lint -- --watch (continuous checking)

common_commands.check: npm run lint                    # Check all files for violations
common_commands.fix: npm run lint -- --fix            # Auto-fix fixable issues
common_commands.watch: npm run lint -- --watch        # Watch mode for development
common_commands.specific_file: npm run lint src/index.ts  # Check specific file

pipeline_integration.buildspec_yml: AWS CodeBuild runs 'npm run lint' before 'npm run build'
pipeline_integration.local_development: VSCode shows violations with squiggles (if ESLint extension installed)
pipeline_integration.pre_commit: Can be configured in package.json with husky/lint-staged
